title: _per-project.pattern.discovered.v1
description:
Shared base schema. Concrete types: <project>.pattern.discovered.v1. Emitted by Tier 4 / deer-improve / telemetry analysis when a recurring pattern is detected. Typically results in a proposal bead with the proposed patch.

Reflexarc producers (the Tier-1 detectors via the synthesis pass) populate the OPTIONAL fields below in addition to the original three required ones. They are additive and non-breaking: legacy producers that emit only {project, pattern_name, evidence, occurrences, proposed_patch} remain valid. A Reflexarc pattern.discovered is only emitted after a bus.agent.run.eval.v1 reaches decision==propose_fix (its replay gate passed), and links back via eval_id.

signature.description: Reflexarc: the stable issue signature '<project>:<detector>:<stable_anchor>' (no run_id, no timestamp) — the issues-table PK this pattern dedups on. Correlates a pattern.discovered to its issue and run.eval.

detector.description: Reflexarc: the detector (DETECTOR_NAME) that raised the pattern, e.g. 'worktree_leak', 'rebuild_cache_miss'.

remediation_rung.description: Reflexarc: the highest achievable Remediation-Ladder rung for the fix. Eliminate > Automate > Inform. Mirrors run.eval.rung.

rung_descent_reason.description: Reflexarc: if remediation_rung is below 'eliminate', why the higher rung was not achievable. The ladder discipline: record why you fell.

proposed_remediation.description: Reflexarc: human-readable description of the deterministic fix (free-text companion to the machine-actionable proposed_patch).

prevalence.description: Reflexarc (Kyoko #2): distinct hit runs / total runs for this (project, detector) over the scoring window.

recurrence_count.description: Reflexarc (Kyoko #5): how many times this exact signature has recurred across runs (issues.recurrence_count).

run_ids.description: Reflexarc: a bounded sample of run_ids exhibiting the pattern, for drill-down.

eval_id.description: Reflexarc: the bus.agent.run.eval.v1 eval_id whose decision==propose_fix licensed emitting this pattern. The audit link from a proposal back to the gated synthesis verdict that justified it.
